prompt: By default the imagen-4 model generates 4 image variations at 16:9.
Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image), two square variations. For all parameters see https://useapi.net/docs/api-google-flow-v1/post-google-flow-images
Image-to-image: pass a local reference file as reference_1 (uploaded automatically). auto aspect ratio derives from the first reference. nano-banana-2 / nano-banana-pro accept up to 10 references.
Imagen 4 portrait. Other models (nano-banana-2, nano-banana-pro) are selectable via the model field — see the POST /images docs.
